ogTitle: Three Rivers vs Thuringowa Central: Climate Safety

heading: Three Rivers vs Thuringowa Central — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Three Rivers, Queensland and Thuringowa Central, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Three Rivers has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Thuringowa Central (29/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Three Rivers or Thuringowa Central safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Three Rivers has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Thuringowa Central scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Three Rivers scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Thuringowa Central scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Three Rivers or Thuringowa Central?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Three Rivers has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
